action.prompt: Before writing, confirm: (1) you have read the target file, (2) confidence ≥70% that this change is correct, (3) change is surgical — no unrelated modifications. If any check fails, stop and investigate.

action.command: echo '[omk] Task complete — remember stop conditions: build passes, tests pass, no broken files.'

hooks.name: Ralph state check on session start

action.command: if [ -f .omk/prd.md ]; then cat .omk/prd.md; else echo '[omk] No active PRD. Modes: interview | ralph | chronicle | direct'; fi
